title: Air Fryer Liners Disposable | Airfryer Parchment Paper Liners | Air Fryer Accessories Square 50 Pcs (20 * 20 * 4.5cm)
features: Non-Stick Surface: Prevents food from sticking, ensuring easy removal of baked or cooked items.
Disposable Design: Hassle-free cleanup, saving time and effort.
Food-Grade Material: Made from high-quality, safe parchment paper.
Perforated Options: Allows optimal air circulation for even cooking.
Versatile Use: Suitable for air fryers, steamers, ovens, and microwaves.
description: Simplify your cooking with Air Fryer Disposable Non-Stick Baking Steamer Liner Paper Parchment. Designed to fit most air fryers, steamers, and ovens, these liners provide a mess-free solution for baking, grilling, steaming, and roasting. Made from food-grade, non-stick parchment paper, they prevent food from sticking while preserving the taste and texture of your dishes. Ideal for healthy cooking, these disposable liners are heat-resistant and ensure effortless cleanup after cooking.
